texto: The processing of universals is the job of the unconscious. If we feed it the opposite it breaks
autor: when it breaks we break and the people around us break.
explicacao: Citação de when it breaks we break and the people around us break. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The processing of universals is the job of the unconscious.
